title: sponia rugosa
intro: Sponia rugosa, also known as the Chinese Pagoda Tree, is a deciduous tree native to China, belonging to the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant contains saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of Sponia rugosa are known to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. Sponia rugosa can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
